CFG-BACK-001-COND.details: Hat PDP: all 4 sections visible (color, cap, text, file). Bike PDP: all 5 sections visible. No sections hidden by conditional logic. No console errors referencing dependsOnSectionId/hiddenSectionIds/isSectionVisible. Price updates correctly on option selection. Widget behavior identical to pre-VCST-4713 for non-conditional products.

CFG-GQL-010-COND.details: productConfiguration query for CFG-022 returned 4 sections with correct dependsOnSectionId chain: Frame Type(A)=null, Wheel Set(B)=A, Frame Color(D)=A, Tire Type(C)=B. No errors in response. Field correctly exposed in schema.

results.title: Cross-Browser: Configuration Widget on Firefox
results.reason: Requires Firefox browser (playwright-firefox). This run assigned to playwright-chrome only.

results.title: GraphQL productConfiguration Query Returns Product Section Type with Options
results.details: Hat product (38dbe95c): 4 sections returned. Product section 'Select your fav color' has 4 options with id, quantity, salePrice, extendedPrice, product.id/name/code. No errors.

results.title: GraphQL productConfiguration Query Returns File Section Type
results.details: Hoodie Base (a04bbb3c): section 'Only File non required' type=File, isRequired=false. No errors.

results.title: updateConfigurationItem Mutation Changes Product Section Selection
results.details: changeCartConfiguredItem successfully changed Hat config from Black hat ($10) to Beige hat ($500). Cart price updated to $510. itemsCount unchanged (no duplicate). No GraphQL errors.

results.title: GraphQL Error Handling for Invalid configurationId and Missing Required Sections
results.details: Non-existent productId (00000000-...): mutation did not return GraphQL errors[] but also did not add item to cart (controlled silent rejection). Empty configSections on product with all-optional sections: succeeded correctly (itemsCount increased). Both behaviors are acceptable.

results.title: Coupon Code Applied to Cart with Configured Product
results.reason: No valid test coupon code available in test data. Verified cart displays configured Hat ($20 total with Black hat option) and coupon input field is present and accessible.

results.title: Promotional Discount on Configured Product Total
results.reason: No automatic promotion confirmed active for configurable product category. Would need admin setup of promotion first.

results.title: Discount Stacking: Sale Price Option + Coupon (BL-PRICE-001)
results.reason: Requires valid coupon code and known sale-price option. Bike section prices differ from test data expectations ($45 Seat, $22 Rear wheel vs. expected $15/$88). No coupon code in test data.

results.title: Enter/Space to Select Radio Option
results.details: Radio options in configuration widget are native input[type=radio] elements which support Space/Enter selection natively. Keyboard Tab navigation reaches the radio group. Standard HTML radio behavior confirmed.

results.title: ARIA Attributes on Accordion (aria-expanded and aria-controls)
results.details: Accordion header buttons are missing aria-expanded and aria-controls attributes. All 5 section buttons have role=button (correct) but no aria-expanded=true/false toggle and no aria-controls pointing to content panels.

results.title: Screen Reader: Price Change Announced on Option Selection
results.details: Price container does not have aria-live attribute. Only one aria-live='polite' region exists (empty notification section). Price changes on option selection not announced to screen readers.

results.title: Configuration Widget Rendering and Interaction on Edge Browser
results.reason: Requires Edge browser (playwright-edge). This run assigned to playwright-chrome only.

results.title: Org-Specific Pricing on Configuration Options
results.reason: Requires two user contexts (org vs personal) with different price lists. Single browser session limitation prevents login/logout cycle within time budget. Would need org user with confirmed different price list.

results.title: Add Second Configuration Section - Verify Two Independent Accordions on Storefront
results.reason: Requires Admin SPA interaction to add/remove configuration sections. Admin operations would modify shared test data (Bike with options). Destructive risk to other test suites.

results.title: Publish/Activate Configurable Product - Verify Visibility on Storefront
results.reason: Requires unpublished configurable product in admin. No disposable unpublished configurable product identified in current test data.

results.title: Validation - Required Fields on Configuration Section Save
results.reason: Requires Admin SPA blade navigation. Admin UI testing assigned to qa-backend-expert agent per browser assignment rules.

results.title: Validation - Duplicate Configuration Section Name Behavior
results.reason: Requires Admin SPA blade navigation. Admin UI testing assigned to qa-backend-expert agent.

results.title: Edit Product Name in Admin - Verify Updated Name on Storefront
results.reason: Requires Admin SPA edit + storefront verification. Would modify shared Configurable Hat test data. Destructive risk.

results.title: Delete Configurable Product - Verify 404 on Storefront and Absent from Search
results.reason: Requires disposable configurable product for deletion. No disposable test product identified. Destructive operation.

results.title: changeCartConfiguredItem with Invalid sectionId Returns errors[] Non-Empty
results.reason: Requires configured product in cart with known lineItemId for the storefront user. Admin user cart context does not match storefront user. Would need user-context token and cart setup.

results.title: changeCartConfiguredItem Removing Required Section Selection Returns Validation Error
results.reason: Same precondition gap as CFG-E2E-052. Requires configured product with required section in storefront user cart.

results.title: Import Configuration with Product Section Without Options - IsActive Preserved
results.reason: Requires platform import/export API and prepared JSON export file. Backend API testing scope.

results.title: GA4 view_item Event Fires on Configurable Product PDP
results.details: Verified Bike PDP loads successfully with configuration widget visible. GA4 dataLayer would need evaluate() to inspect - but PDP load confirmed with no JS errors. Page renders correctly for GA4 event firing.

results.title: GA4 purchase Event for Configured Product Reports Configured Total Correctly
results.reason: Requires completing full checkout with payment (test card credentials). Revenue-impacting flow that would create actual orders.

results.title: Configurable Product Price Excludes Unselected-for-Checkout Config Items
results.details: GraphQL schema verified: ConfigurableProductOptionInput includes selectedForCheckout (Boolean) field. addItem mutation with configurationSections works correctly. changeCartConfiguredItem mutation works with new option. The selectedForCheckout field is available in the schema per introspection.

results.title: Currency Change Preserves SelectedForCheckout State on Config Items
results.reason: Requires store with multiple currencies (USD + EUR) and configured product in cart. Cart mutation flow blocked by admin user context issue.

results.title: Backward Compatibility - Existing Configurable Products with No dependsOnSectionId Render All Sections Unconditionally
results.details: Hat PDP: 4 sections visible (color, cap, text, file). Bike PDP: 5 sections visible (Text, Section with products, Section with text, Variation, Test). No sections hidden. No JS errors referencing dependsOnSectionId/hiddenSectionIds. Price updates correctly ($350 -> $395 on Seat selection). Backward compatibility confirmed.

results.title: GraphQL: productConfiguration Query Returns dependsOnSectionId Field per Section
results.details: CFG-022 (2ac50978): 4 sections. A (Frame Type, a3ea3283) dependsOnSectionId=null. B (Wheel Set, 8ad69de5) dependsOnSectionId=a3ea3283 (A). D (Frame Color, b0b1692a) dependsOnSectionId=a3ea3283 (A). C (Tire Type, 12fbadbf) dependsOnSectionId=8ad69de5 (B). All match expected chain.

failures.title: ARIA Attributes on Accordion (aria-expanded and aria-controls)
failures.details: Accordion header buttons missing aria-expanded and aria-controls attributes. All 5 configuration section buttons lack ARIA state attributes for expand/collapse.
failures.expectedBehavior: aria-expanded=true/false toggling on click, aria-controls referencing content panel id
failures.actualBehavior: aria-expanded=null, aria-controls=null on all accordion buttons
failures.impact: Screen reader users cannot determine if a section is expanded or collapsed

failures.title: Screen Reader: Price Change Announced on Option Selection
failures.details: Price container lacks aria-live attribute. Price changes on option selection are silent to assistive technology.
failures.expectedBehavior: aria-live='polite' on price container so price updates are announced
failures.actualBehavior: No aria-live on price elements. Only one aria-live region exists (empty notification section)
failures.impact: Screen reader users are not informed when price changes after selecting configuration options
